name: Mansion #25
description: Sa'd al-Akhbiyah, 'The Lucky One of the Tents,' ruled by Venus, represents shelter, protection, and domesticity. Particularly favorable for marriage, establishing homes, and creating safe havens. The tent stars in Aquarius symbolize the archetypal dwelling place where families gather in safety and love. The generative artwork renders these protective tent stars in Venus' nurturing rose-green palette, with sheltering geometric domes representing home, marriage, and domestic harmony.

attributes.value: The Lucky One of the Tents
Marriage, establishing homes, creating shelter, domestic harmony, family
